metadata.description: YAMTAM Capability Matrix - Definitive permission map for Agent Gates L0-L5

core.description: Full system access - Reserved for internal YAMTAM maintenance agents

restricted.description: Limited access for speculative or untrusted research

L0_AUDIT.description: Logs every tool call without blocking.

L1_SCOPE.description: Ensures edits stay within declared project boundaries.

L2_COMMIT.description: Warns on commits spanning multiple architecture layers.

L3_TRUTH.description: Blocks claims of success without verifiable tool output.

L4_DEPLOY.description: Blocks all deployment and cloud-mutating commands.

L5_DESTRUCTIVE.description: Hard blocks rm -rf, drop table, and other destructive commands.
